segments.text: You been moving cautious like the boom got eyes
I see how you look when the baseline drops
Half a smile on your face, then you tell me stop
You got secrets in your rhythm,
But I'm not here to run it,
I'm here to bring it home
Won't tell a soul, not anybody
Keep it locked, keep it quiet, nobody
I won't make it public, no
I said I'd be that somebody
I said I'd be that somebody
Asked if I'm steady, girl, you know I don't fold
I don't move, but I don't speak what I'm told
You can test my patience, you can check my pad
I'll still keep your name on the safer side
You don't need a rumor, you don't need a scene
You need somebody solid when the lights go green
And if the world gets loud,
I'll turn the noise down low
Put your trust in my hands and I won't let it grow
You ain't gotta watch your back when I'm beside you
I don't need the spotlight just to hide it from you
That's why I move different when I'm around you
I saw that from the first time I found you
I said I'd be that somebody
I said I'd be that somebody
Then act like I said too much
I like it when you're goody
I love it when you're naughty
Won't tell nobody, I'm talking nobody
I won't tell nobody, I'm talking nobody
I'll keep it between you and me
I'll be exactly who I said I'd be
Won't tell nobody, I'm talking nobody
I won't tell nobody, I'm talking nobody
That they know, know, know, know, know
I said I'll be that somebody
I said I'll be that somebody
I'll be, I'll be, I'll be that somebody
